drizzle-schema.rule: New tables/columns mirror agent-mcp schema style: sqliteTable(...), text().primaryKey(), integer().notNull().default(...), index(...), .references(...). composed_prompts + experiment_assignments tables + sessions.composed_prompt_id (nullable FK, backward-compatible) are generated with drizzle-kit into packages/ai/agent-mcp/drizzle/ and run via db/migrate.ts.

store-class.rule: composed-prompt-store.ts mirrors the existing agent-store.ts / session-store.ts pattern: constructor takes a BetterSQLite3Database, thin Drizzle queries, typed ToolError codes. ComposedPromptStore upsert / findByAgentContext / read round-trips a row through a real on-disk DB proven by reopen.

agent-mcp-types.rule: New shared types (ComposedPrompt) extend @adhd/agent-mcp-types — no new types package, no circular dep on the orchestrator (REFERENCES.md '@adhd/agent-mcp-types'). AgentDefinition.systemPrompt is RESIGNED from a required authoring field to an optional/computed compat shim (or replaced by composedPromptId); the resolver populates it from compiler output.
